diagrams.title: Project Management Process Groups

diagrams.purpose: Helps understand the flow and sequence of PM activities

diagrams.title: Risk Probability-Impact Matrix
diagrams.description: 2x2 or 3x3 matrix classifying risks based on probability and impact

diagrams.title: Project Stakeholder Matrix
diagrams.description: Grid showing stakeholders and their interest/influence levels

visuals.description: Visual diagram for activities covered by software project management
